Resource Profile: EMS Encounter

Official URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-encounter Version: 0.2.0
Draft as of 2026-07-19 Computable Name: EMSEncounter

EMS-specific constraints on US Core Encounter representing a single EMS response/call. Covers NEMSIS eResponse (unit/agency, response mode, delays), eTimes (all 19 timestamps), eDispatch (dispatch complaint, EMD, priority), and eDisposition (unit, crew, transport, destination, level of care) sections. NEMSIS Version 3.5.1.251001CP2.

Usages:

  • Refer to this Profile: EMS Patient Care Report (PCR), EMS Cardiac Arrest Condition, EMS Injury Condition, EMS Condition — Past Medical History... Show 13 more, EMS Condition, EMS Document Reference, EMS Medication Administration, EMS Medication Statement — Home Medications, EMS Airway Management Observation, EMS Blood Pressure Observation, EMS Physical Exam Observation, EMS Glasgow Coma Score (GCS) Panel, EMS Lab and Imaging Observation, EMS Outcome Observation, EMS Vital Signs Observation, EMS Procedure and EMS Questionnaire Response — Custom Element Results
  • Examples for this Profile: Encounter/ex-ems-encounter
  • CapabilityStatements using this Profile: EMS Core Server Capability Statement

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Encounter 0..* USCoreEncounterProfile An interaction during which services are provided to the patient
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Slices for extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:responseType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.05 - Type of Service Requested
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-type
Binding: EMS Response Type (ValueSet) (required)
extension:unitType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.07 - Unit Transport and Equipment Capability
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit-type
Binding: EMS Unit Type (ValueSet) (required)
extension:responseMode S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.23 - Response Mode to Scene
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-mode
Binding: EMS Response Mode to Scene (ValueSet) (required)
extension:additionalResponseMode S 0..* CodeableConcept eResponse.24 - Additional Response Mode Descriptors
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-additional-response-mode
Binding: EMS Additional Response Mode Descriptors (ValueSet) (required)
extension:responseDelays S 0..1 (Complex) eResponse.08–12 - Delay types (dispatch, response, scene, transport, turn-around)
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-delays
extension:emsUnit S 0..1 (Complex) eResponse.13/14 - EMS Vehicle Unit Number and Call Sign
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit
extension:emsTimes S 0..1 (Complex) eTimes.01–19 - Full set of EMS response timestamps
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-times
extension:dispatchReason S 0..1 CodeableConcept eDispatch.01 - Dispatch Complaint
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-reason
Binding: EMS Dispatch Reason (ValueSet) (extensible)
extension:dispatchInfo S 0..1 (Complex) eDispatch.02–06 - EMD performed, determinant, dispatch center, priority, CAD record ID
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-info
extension:dispositionCodes S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.19, 27–32 - Unit/patient/crew/transport disposition and level of care
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-disposition-codes
extension:transportDetails S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.16–18 - Transport method, mode, and additional mode descriptors
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-transport-details
extension:destinationDetails S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.20–26, 11 - Destination reason, type, facility, capability, alerts
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-destination-details
extension:protocolUsed S 0..* CodeableConcept eProtocols.01 - Protocols Used
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-protocol-used
Binding: EMS Protocols Used (extensible)
extension:otherContext 0..1 (Complex) EMS Other Context
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-other-context
extension:crewSafety 0..* (Complex) EMS Crew Safety
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-crew-safety
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Slices for identifier SΣ 0..* Identifier (USCDI) Identifier(s) by which this encounter is known
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:type
identifier:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
identifier:incidentNumber SΣ 0..1 Identifier eResponse.03 - Incident Number
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .
type SΣ 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
Required Pattern: At least the following
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: VN
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Visit number
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
identifier:responseNumber SΣ 0..1 Identifier eResponse.04 - EMS Response Number
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .
type SΣ 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
Required Pattern: At least the following
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: RI
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Resource identifier
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
status ?!SΣ 1..1 code (USCDI) planned | arrived | triaged | in-progress | onleave | finished | cancelled +
Binding: EncounterStatus (required): Current state of the encounter.
class SΣ 1..1 Coding Encounter class — EMER for emergency responses, see eResponse.05 for full type
Binding: ActEncounterCode (3.0.0) (extensible): Classification of the encounter.
type SΣ 1..* CodeableConcept High-level EMS encounter type classification
Binding: US Core Encounter Type (extensible): Valueset to describe the Encounter Type
subject SΣ 1..1 Reference(EMS Patient) The EMS patient
participant SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eCrew - EMS crew members responding
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept (USCDI) Role of participant in encounter
Binding: ParticipantType (extensible): Role of participant in encounter.
period S 0..1 Period (USCDI) Period of time during the encounter that the participant participated
individual SΣ 0..1 Reference(EMS Practitioner) (USCDI) Persons involved in the encounter other than the patient
period S 0..1 Period eTimes.03 (start) to eTimes.12 (end)
start SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.03 - Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time
end SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.12 - Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time
reasonCode SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept eSituation.09 - Primary Symptom
Binding: EncounterReasonCodes (preferred): Reason why the encounter takes place.
reasonReference SΣ 0..* Reference(US Core Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile S | US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile S | US Core Procedure Profile | Observation | ImmunizationRecommendation) (USCDI) Reason the encounter takes place (reference)
diagnosis SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eSituation.11 - Primary Provider's Impression of the Patient's Condition
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
condition Σ 1..1 Reference(EMS Condition) The diagnosis or procedure relevant to the encounter
use S 0..1 CodeableConcept Role that this diagnosis has within the encounter (e.g. admission, billing, discharge …)
Binding: DiagnosisRole (preferred): The type of diagnosis this condition represents.
hospitalization S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition - Destination and disposition information
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
destination 0..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) eDisposition.01/02 - Destination/Transferred To
dischargeDisposition S 0..1 CodeableConcept eDisposition.21 - Type of Destination
Binding: EMS Type of Destination (preferred)
Slices for location S 0..* BackboneElement (USCDI) List of locations where the patient has been
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:status
location:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
location:scene S 0..1 BackboneElement eScene - Scene location
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Scene Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: active
location:destination S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition.01/02 - Destination facility
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: completed
serviceProvider S 1..1 Reference(EMS Organization) eResponse.01 - EMS Agency Number

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Encounter.identifier.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.identifier:incidentNumber.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.identifier:incidentNumber.​type Base extensible IdentifierType 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.identifier:responseNumber.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.identifier:responseNumber.​type Base extensible IdentifierType 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.status Base required EncounterStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.class Base extensible ActEncounterCode 📍3.0.0 THO v7.1
Encounter.type Base extensible US Core Encounter Type 📦6.1.0 US Core v6.1
Encounter.participant.​type Base extensible Participant type 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.reasonCode Base preferred Encounter Reason Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.diagnosis.​use Base preferred DiagnosisRole 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.hospitalization.​dischargeDisposition Base preferred EMS Type of Destination 📦0.2.0 This IG
Encounter.location:scene.​status Base required EncounterLocationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.location:destination.​status Base required EncounterLocationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Encounter A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from USCoreEncounterProfile

coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: VN
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Visit number
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period Σ 0..1 Period Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner Σ 0..1 Reference(Organization) Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:responseNumber SΣ 0..1 Identifier eResponse.04 - EMS Response Number
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .
type SΣ 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
Required Pattern: At least the following
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: RI
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Resource identifier
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period Σ 0..1 Period Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner Σ 0..1 Reference(Organization) Organization that issued id (may be just text)
status ?!SΣ 1..1 code (USCDI) planned | arrived | triaged | in-progress | onleave | finished | cancelled +
Binding: EncounterStatus (required): Current state of the encounter.
statusHistory 0..* BackboneElement List of past encounter statuses
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
status 1..1 code planned | arrived | triaged | in-progress | onleave | finished | cancelled +
Binding: EncounterStatus (required): Current state of the encounter.
period 1..1 Period The time that the episode was in the specified status
class SΣ 1..1 Coding Encounter class — EMER for emergency responses, see eResponse.05 for full type
Binding: ActEncounterCode (3.0.0) (extensible): Classification of the encounter.
classHistory 0..* BackboneElement List of past encounter classes
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
class 1..1 Coding inpatient | outpatient | ambulatory | emergency +
Binding: ActEncounterCode (3.0.0) (extensible): Classification of the encounter.
period 1..1 Period The time that the episode was in the specified class
type SΣ 1..* CodeableConcept High-level EMS encounter type classification
Binding: US Core Encounter Type (extensible): Valueset to describe the Encounter Type
serviceType Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept Specific type of service
Binding: ServiceType (example): Broad categorization of the service that is to be provided.
priority 0..1 CodeableConcept Indicates the urgency of the encounter
Binding: ActPriority (3.0.0) (example): Indicates the urgency of the encounter.
subject SΣ 1..1 Reference(EMS Patient) The EMS patient
episodeOfCare Σ 0..* Reference(EpisodeOfCare) Episode(s) of care that this encounter should be recorded against
basedOn 0..* Reference(ServiceRequest) The ServiceRequest that initiated this encounter
participant SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eCrew - EMS crew members responding
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept (USCDI) Role of participant in encounter
Binding: ParticipantType (extensible): Role of participant in encounter.
period S 0..1 Period (USCDI) Period of time during the encounter that the participant participated
individual SΣ 0..1 Reference(EMS Practitioner) (USCDI) Persons involved in the encounter other than the patient
appointment Σ 0..* Reference(Appointment) The appointment that scheduled this encounter
period S 0..1 Period eTimes.03 (start) to eTimes.12 (end)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
start SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.03 - Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time
end SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.12 - Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time
length 0..1 Duration Quantity of time the encounter lasted (less time absent)
reasonCode SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept eSituation.09 - Primary Symptom
Binding: EncounterReasonCodes (preferred): Reason why the encounter takes place.
reasonReference SΣ 0..* Reference(US Core Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile S | US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile S | US Core Procedure Profile | Observation | ImmunizationRecommendation) (USCDI) Reason the encounter takes place (reference)
diagnosis SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eSituation.11 - Primary Provider's Impression of the Patient's Condition
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
condition Σ 1..1 Reference(EMS Condition) The diagnosis or procedure relevant to the encounter
use S 0..1 CodeableConcept Role that this diagnosis has within the encounter (e.g. admission, billing, discharge …)
Binding: DiagnosisRole (preferred): The type of diagnosis this condition represents.
rank 0..1 positiveInt Ranking of the diagnosis (for each role type)
account 0..* Reference(Account) The set of accounts that may be used for billing for this Encounter
hospitalization S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition - Destination and disposition information
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
preAdmissionIdentifier 0..1 Identifier Pre-admission identifier
origin 0..1 Reference(Location | Organization) The location/organization from which the patient came before admission
admitSource 0..1 CodeableConcept From where patient was admitted (physician referral, transfer)
Binding: AdmitSource (preferred): From where the patient was admitted.
reAdmission 0..1 CodeableConcept The type of hospital re-admission that has occurred (if any). If the value is absent, then this is not identified as a readmission
Binding: Hl7VSReAdmissionIndicator (3.0.0) (example): The reason for re-admission of this hospitalization encounter.
dietPreference 0..* CodeableConcept Diet preferences reported by the patient
Binding: Diet (example): Medical, cultural or ethical food preferences to help with catering requirements.
specialCourtesy 0..* CodeableConcept Special courtesies (VIP, board member)
Binding: SpecialCourtesy (preferred): Special courtesies.
specialArrangement 0..* CodeableConcept Wheelchair, translator, stretcher, etc.
Binding: SpecialArrangements (preferred): Special arrangements.
destination 0..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) eDisposition.01/02 - Destination/Transferred To
dischargeDisposition S 0..1 CodeableConcept eDisposition.21 - Type of Destination
Binding: EMS Type of Destination (preferred)
Slices for location S 0..* BackboneElement (USCDI) List of locations where the patient has been
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:status
location:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 0..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
location:scene S 0..1 BackboneElement eScene - Scene location
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Scene Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: active
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
location:destination S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition.01/02 - Destination facility
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: completed
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
serviceProvider S 1..1 Reference(EMS Organization) eResponse.01 - EMS Agency Number
partOf 0..1 Reference(Encounter) Another Encounter this encounter is part of

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Encounter A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from USCoreEncounterProfile

Summary

Mandatory: 1 element(4 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 23 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • EMS Patient (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-patient)
  • EMS Practitioner (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-practitioner)
  • EMS Condition (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-condition)
  • EMS Destination Location (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-location-destination)
  • EMS Scene Location (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-location-scene)
  • EMS Organization (https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-organization)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-type
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit-type
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-mode
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-additional-response-mode
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-delays
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-times
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-reason
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-info
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-disposition-codes
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-transport-details
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-destination-details
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-protocol-used
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-other-context
  • https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-crew-safety

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Encounter.identifier
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Encounter.location

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Encounter 0..* USCoreEncounterProfile An interaction during which services are provided to the patient
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Slices for extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:responseType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.05 - Type of Service Requested
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-type
Binding: EMS Response Type (ValueSet) (required)
extension:unitType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.07 - Unit Transport and Equipment Capability
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit-type
Binding: EMS Unit Type (ValueSet) (required)

Binding: EMS Response Mode to Scene (ValueSet) (required)

URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-additional-response-mode
Binding: EMS Additional Response Mode Descriptors (ValueSet) (required)

URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-delays

Encounter.class Base extensible ActEncounterCode 📍3.0.0 THO v7.1
Encounter.type Base extensible US Core Encounter Type 📦6.1.0 US Core v6.1
Encounter.participant.​type Base extensible Participant type 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.reasonCode Base preferred Encounter Reason Codes 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.diagnosis.​use Base preferred DiagnosisRole 📦4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.hospitalization.​dischargeDisposition Base preferred EMS Type of Destination 📦0.2.0 This IG
Encounter.location:scene.​status Base required EncounterLocationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Encounter.location:destination.​status Base required EncounterLocationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Encounter A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Differential View

This structure is derived from USCoreEncounterProfile

Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Encounter 0..* USCoreEncounterProfile An interaction during which services are provided to the patient
Slices for extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:responseType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.05 - Type of Service Requested
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-type
Binding: EMS Response Type (ValueSet) (required)
extension:unitType S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.07 - Unit Transport and Equipment Capability
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit-type
Binding: EMS Unit Type (ValueSet) (required)
extension:responseMode S 0..1 CodeableConcept eResponse.23 - Response Mode to Scene
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-mode
Binding: EMS Response Mode to Scene (ValueSet) (required)
extension:additionalResponseMode S 0..* CodeableConcept eResponse.24 - Additional Response Mode Descriptors
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-additional-response-mode
Binding: EMS Additional Response Mode Descriptors (ValueSet) (required)
extension:responseDelays S 0..1 (Complex) eResponse.08–12 - Delay types (dispatch, response, scene, transport, turn-around)
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-response-delays
extension:emsUnit S 0..1 (Complex) eResponse.13/14 - EMS Vehicle Unit Number and Call Sign
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-unit
extension:emsTimes S 0..1 (Complex) eTimes.01–19 - Full set of EMS response timestamps
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-times
extension:dispatchReason S 0..1 CodeableConcept eDispatch.01 - Dispatch Complaint
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-reason
Binding: EMS Dispatch Reason (ValueSet) (extensible)
extension:dispatchInfo S 0..1 (Complex) eDispatch.02–06 - EMD performed, determinant, dispatch center, priority, CAD record ID
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-dispatch-info
extension:dispositionCodes S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.19, 27–32 - Unit/patient/crew/transport disposition and level of care
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-disposition-codes
extension:transportDetails S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.16–18 - Transport method, mode, and additional mode descriptors
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-transport-details
extension:destinationDetails S 0..1 (Complex) eDisposition.20–26, 11 - Destination reason, type, facility, capability, alerts
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-destination-details
extension:protocolUsed S 0..* CodeableConcept eProtocols.01 - Protocols Used
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-protocol-used
Binding: EMS Protocols Used (extensible)
extension:otherContext 0..1 (Complex) EMS Other Context
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-other-context
extension:crewSafety 0..* (Complex) EMS Crew Safety
URL: https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-crew-safety
Slices for identifier 0..* Identifier (USCDI) Identifier(s) by which this encounter is known
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:type
identifier:incidentNumber S 0..1 Identifier eResponse.03 - Incident Number
type S 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Required Pattern: At least the following
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: VN
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Visit number
system 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
value 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
identifier:responseNumber S 0..1 Identifier eResponse.04 - EMS Response Number
type S 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Required Pattern: At least the following
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Fixed Value: (Complex)
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fixed Value: RI
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Fixed Value: Resource identifier
system 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
value 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
class 1..1 Coding Encounter class — EMER for emergency responses, see eResponse.05 for full type
type 1..* CodeableConcept High-level EMS encounter type classification
subject 1..1 Reference(EMS Patient) The EMS patient
participant 0..* BackboneElement eCrew - EMS crew members responding
individual 0..1 Reference(EMS Practitioner) (USCDI) Persons involved in the encounter other than the patient
period 0..1 Period eTimes.03 (start) to eTimes.12 (end)
start S 0..1 dateTime eTimes.03 - Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time
end S 0..1 dateTime eTimes.12 - Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time
reasonCode 0..* CodeableConcept eSituation.09 - Primary Symptom
diagnosis S 0..* BackboneElement eSituation.11 - Primary Provider's Impression of the Patient's Condition
condition 1..1 Reference(EMS Condition) The diagnosis or procedure relevant to the encounter
use S 0..1 CodeableConcept Role that this diagnosis has within the encounter (e.g. admission, billing, discharge …)
hospitalization 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition - Destination and disposition information
destination 0..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) eDisposition.01/02 - Destination/Transferred To
dischargeDisposition 0..1 CodeableConcept eDisposition.21 - Type of Destination
Binding: EMS Type of Destination (preferred)
Slices for location 0..* BackboneElement (USCDI) List of locations where the patient has been
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:status
location:scene S 0..1 BackboneElement eScene - Scene location
location 1..1 Reference(EMS Scene Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Required Pattern: active
location:destination S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition.01/02 - Destination facility
location 1..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Required Pattern: completed
serviceProvider 1..1 Reference(EMS Organization) eResponse.01 - EMS Agency Number

Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Encounter 0..* USCoreEncounterProfile An interaction during which services are provided to the patient
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguages Max Binding
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

Slices for identifier SΣ 0..* Identifier (USCDI) Identifier(s) by which this encounter is known
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:type
identifier:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .
type Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
system SΣ 1..1 uri (USCDI) The namespace for the identifier value
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value SΣ 1..1 string (USCDI) The value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period Σ 0..1 Period Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner Σ 0..1 Reference(Organization) Organization that issued id (may be just text)

id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations

Binding: EncounterStatus (required): Current state of the encounter.
statusHistory 0..* BackboneElement List of past encounter statuses
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
status 1..1 code planned | arrived | triaged | in-progress | onleave | finished | cancelled +
Binding: EncounterStatus (required): Current state of the encounter.
period 1..1 Period The time that the episode was in the specified status
class SΣ 1..1 Coding Encounter class — EMER for emergency responses, see eResponse.05 for full type
Binding: ActEncounterCode (3.0.0) (extensible): Classification of the encounter.
classHistory 0..* BackboneElement List of past encounter classes
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
class 1..1 Coding inpatient | outpatient | ambulatory | emergency +
Binding: ActEncounterCode (3.0.0) (extensible): Classification of the encounter.
period 1..1 Period The time that the episode was in the specified class
type SΣ 1..* CodeableConcept High-level EMS encounter type classification
Binding: US Core Encounter Type (extensible): Valueset to describe the Encounter Type
serviceType Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept Specific type of service
Binding: ServiceType (example): Broad categorization of the service that is to be provided.
priority 0..1 CodeableConcept Indicates the urgency of the encounter
Binding: ActPriority (3.0.0) (example): Indicates the urgency of the encounter.
subject SΣ 1..1 Reference(EMS Patient) The EMS patient
episodeOfCare Σ 0..* Reference(EpisodeOfCare) Episode(s) of care that this encounter should be recorded against
basedOn 0..* Reference(ServiceRequest) The ServiceRequest that initiated this encounter
participant SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eCrew - EMS crew members responding
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept (USCDI) Role of participant in encounter
Binding: ParticipantType (extensible): Role of participant in encounter.
period S 0..1 Period (USCDI) Period of time during the encounter that the participant participated
individual SΣ 0..1 Reference(EMS Practitioner) (USCDI) Persons involved in the encounter other than the patient
appointment Σ 0..* Reference(Appointment) The appointment that scheduled this encounter
period S 0..1 Period eTimes.03 (start) to eTimes.12 (end)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
start SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.03 - Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time
end SΣC 0..1 dateTime eTimes.12 - Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time
length 0..1 Duration Quantity of time the encounter lasted (less time absent)
reasonCode SΣ 0..* CodeableConcept eSituation.09 - Primary Symptom
Binding: EncounterReasonCodes (preferred): Reason why the encounter takes place.
reasonReference SΣ 0..* Reference(US Core Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile S | US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile S | US Core Procedure Profile | Observation | ImmunizationRecommendation) (USCDI) Reason the encounter takes place (reference)
diagnosis SΣ 0..* BackboneElement eSituation.11 - Primary Provider's Impression of the Patient's Condition
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
condition Σ 1..1 Reference(EMS Condition) The diagnosis or procedure relevant to the encounter
use S 0..1 CodeableConcept Role that this diagnosis has within the encounter (e.g. admission, billing, discharge …)
Binding: DiagnosisRole (preferred): The type of diagnosis this condition represents.
rank 0..1 positiveInt Ranking of the diagnosis (for each role type)
account 0..* Reference(Account) The set of accounts that may be used for billing for this Encounter
hospitalization S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition - Destination and disposition information
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
preAdmissionIdentifier 0..1 Identifier Pre-admission identifier
origin 0..1 Reference(Location | Organization) The location/organization from which the patient came before admission
admitSource 0..1 CodeableConcept From where patient was admitted (physician referral, transfer)
Binding: AdmitSource (preferred): From where the patient was admitted.
reAdmission 0..1 CodeableConcept The type of hospital re-admission that has occurred (if any). If the value is absent, then this is not identified as a readmission
Binding: Hl7VSReAdmissionIndicator (3.0.0) (example): The reason for re-admission of this hospitalization encounter.
dietPreference 0..* CodeableConcept Diet preferences reported by the patient
Binding: Diet (example): Medical, cultural or ethical food preferences to help with catering requirements.
specialCourtesy 0..* CodeableConcept Special courtesies (VIP, board member)
Binding: SpecialCourtesy (preferred): Special courtesies.
specialArrangement 0..* CodeableConcept Wheelchair, translator, stretcher, etc.
Binding: SpecialArrangements (preferred): Special arrangements.
destination 0..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) eDisposition.01/02 - Destination/Transferred To
dischargeDisposition S 0..1 CodeableConcept eDisposition.21 - Type of Destination
Binding: EMS Type of Destination (preferred)
Slices for location S 0..* BackboneElement (USCDI) List of locations where the patient has been
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:status
location:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 0..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
location:scene S 0..1 BackboneElement eScene - Scene location
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Scene Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: active
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
location:destination S 0..1 BackboneElement eDisposition.01/02 - Destination facility
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
location S 1..1 Reference(EMS Destination Location) (USCDI) Location the encounter takes place
status 1..1 code planned | active | reserved | completed
Binding: EncounterLocationStatus (required): The status of the location.
Required Pattern: completed
physicalType 0..1 CodeableConcept The physical type of the location (usually the level in the location hierachy - bed room ward etc.)
Binding: LocationType (example): Physical form of the location.
period 0..1 Period Time period during which the patient was present at the location
serviceProvider S 1..1 Reference(EMS Organization) eResponse.01 - EMS Agency Number
partOf 0..1 Reference(Encounter) Another Encounter this encounter is part of

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Encounter If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Encounter If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Encounter A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from USCoreEncounterProfile

This structure defines the following Slices:
